creator: drtr0jan@yandex.ru
text:
(In reply to Daniel Engberg from comment #4)
Hi Daniel,

unfortunately the libfmt upstream doesn't allow to build static and shared libs simultaneously ( https://github.com/fmtlib/fmt/issues/600 ).

What about foundationdb...
The patch for fixing BROKEN is waiting for commit about half a year ( bug #269236 ).
Foundationdb is depends on libfmt ( https://github.com/apple/foundationdb/blob/59e1470263ce37a02174891257f193a87b304926/contrib/CMakeLists.txt#L4-L7 ). And all foundationdb depends are linking statically usually. At last, I work on porting foundationdb 7.3 for FreeBSD currently.
